nasb.text: The king covered his face and cried out with a loud voice, “O my son Absalom, O Absalom, my son, my son!”

esv.text: The king covered his face, and the king cried with a loud voice, “O my son Absalom, O Absalom, my son, my son!”

cnv.text: 王蒙著臉，大聲哀哭，說：“我兒押沙龍啊！押沙龍，我兒，我兒啊！”

ccb.text: 王仍掩面痛哭：“我儿押沙龙啊！押沙龙！我儿！我儿啊！”
